tests.name: TestCLIFinalRollupDeniesFinalResponseWhenReadyNodesRemain
asserts: CLI imports workgraph with 10 completed and 2 ready nodes
CLI final rollup reports ready_nodes_remaining=2 and preserves continuation action
final rollup keeps safe_to_execute, executes_work, approves_work, and provider_calls false

tests.name: TestFinalRollupDeniesFinalResponseWhenReadyNodesRemain
asserts: builder-level final rollup denies final response while ready nodes remain
